message:
deps(transport): Add getrandom for cryptographically secure WebSocket masking

Adds getrandom dependency to fastmcp-transport for RFC 6455 compliant
WebSocket client frame masking.

**Why getrandom:**
RFC 6455 Section 5.3 requires WebSocket client mask keys to be
"unpredictable" to prevent cache poisoning attacks. The previous
implementation used a simple counter which was deterministic and
predictable - suitable for testing but not production.

getrandom provides a minimal, cross-platform interface to the OS CSPRNG:
- Uses /dev/urandom on Linux
- Uses BCryptGenRandom on Windows
- Uses getentropy() where available
- No-std compatible with custom backends

**Version:** 0.3 (latest stable with new API)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ fastmcp-protocol.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
+getrandom.workspace = true
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true
